subject: A forearm and hand holding a cylindrical metallic device from which a glowing yellow-green energy blade or light projects
description: A single forearm and hand rise from the lower frame, gripping a cylindrical metal tube or lantern-like device. The device has a segmented metallic body with green cracked-light detailing and a circular aperture from which a bright yellow-green blade or tongue of light extends outward. The arm wears a leather and cloth bracer. The background is dark purple-grey smoke or mist, establishing an ominous atmosphere. The composition is minimal — no face, no body beyond the arm — focusing entirely on the glowing device as the visual subject.
foreground: Forearm and hand gripping a segmented metal tube emitting a yellow-green glowing blade
emotion: purposeful — firm grip, steady upward hold of the lit device
